description: Direct-redemption comparison case: Hyatt 60k already funds the 45k Ginza award, so the correct plan redeems directly with no transfer. Drives the LLM baselines for the direct-redemption scenario.

fixture_manifest.frozen_world_scope: Direct-redemption wallet: Chase UR 0, World of Hyatt 60k, United 0, Chase->Hyatt and Chase->United at 1:1, Ginza award 45k, United award 60k.

scoring_rules.baseline_rule: Baselines may persist final plans for scoring, but may not use typed dependency edges or shared graph state internally.

cases.query: What is the best way to use my points for a three-night hotel stay in Tokyo?
